name: vike-view
description: vike-view: schema-driven views (list / record / form) for any framework. The framework-agnostic core that derives a view-model from the composed schema — defineView + column/field/display refinements, schema->widget mapping, row scoping, FK-aware selects, projection, and a validated list query. vike-admin is a preset over it; per-framework renderers draw it.
